name: Data & Systems
tagline: Turning information into insight — data-driven decision making for Emerging 100 ATL.
overview: The Data & Systems committee is the infrastructure behind every number E100 claims publicly. This committee owns Monday.com administration, pre- and post-event surveys, attendance tracking, volunteer hour reporting, the annual impact report, and website updates. Data is the proof — it validates the mission and makes the case to every partner and community stakeholder who asks what E100 actually does.
